title: Prohibit Direct Standard Recipe Test Execution
forbids: test files invoking the Standard recipe outside its canonical product-test fixture
why: Whole-recipe tests must share the same admitted Civ7 preset, complete map configuration, runtime initialization, and single execution boundary so synthetic grids cannot masquerade as product evidence.
remediate: Route whole Standard recipe execution through test/recipes/swooper-physics-standard/fixtures/standard-recipe.ts. Operation, artifact, and step tests should invoke their narrower production-owned surfaces instead.
message: Use the Standard recipe product-test fixture instead of invoking standardRecipe.run directly.
